regions.label: text
regions.text: Our entire line of High-Grade Suits and Overcoats, for Men and Boys, is thrown into the greatest sacrifice sale in the history of this firm. Our new spring stock is arriving daily. We are compelled to sell out our present stock to make room for these goods.

regions.label: paragraph_title
regions.text: ALL SUITS AND OVERCOATS FOR MEN AND BOYS

regions.label: paragraph_title
regions.text: THE STOCK IS NOW READY FOR SELLING

regions.label: text
regions.text: We will bend every energy to close out this entire stock in the shortest time possible. SO DON'T DELAY. COME TODAY.

regions.label: text
regions.text: Men's and Youths Overcoats, Rain Coats, Top Coats

regions.label: text
regions.text: Our original prices are plainly marked. No changes or "Sale Prices" on our price tickets. Just figure 1-3 off the original prices yourself, thus making your own prices.

regions.label: text
regions.text: BOYS' OVERCOATS and TOP COATS SAME PRICES AS ABOVE.

regions.label: text
regions.text: In this lot you will find such good values that it will pay you to buy now. An extra or two pairs of trousers are always in order.
